R

Reservation - Class in model
Reservation holds a simple reservation record for any module item (flight, hotel, tour...).
Reservation(String, String, String, String, double) - Constructor for class model.Reservation
 
ReservationService - Class in service
ReservationService manages reservations (in-memory).
ReservationService() - Constructor for class service.ReservationService
 
ReservationWindow - Class in gui
Enhanced ReservationWindow with modern UI and self-managed cart.
ReservationWindow() - Constructor for class gui.ReservationWindow
Constructor: initializes the window, builds the UI layout, loads reservations from ReservationService, and displays the window.
Restaurant(String, String, String, double) - Constructor for class service.SmartCityService.Restaurant
